description_long: This spice rack features a sleek, angular design with a single horizontal shelf that appears to be made from a smooth, light-colored material, likely metal or plastic. The rack has a distinctive geometric profile, with one side curving upward and the other side extending outward, creating a modern aesthetic. Three small, cylindrical spice containers are neatly arranged in a row on the shelf, each with a metallic or dark cap. The containers are evenly spaced, suggesting a linear arrangement for easy access. The surface of the rack is unadorned, with no visible labels or markings on either the rack or the containers. Its compact size and flat base indicate it is intended for placement on a countertop or similar surface in a kitchen or urban setting.
description: A modern, angular spice rack with a single shelf holding three evenly spaced spice containers, all in a sleek, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved and angular profile of the rack, with one spice container visible in the center.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the full linear arrangement of three spice containers on the flat shelf.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the geometric shape and a single spice container in the middle.
description_view_3: Low side view displaying the thickness of the base and the three spice containers aligned on the shelf.
